title: uentseto
text: uentseto Make an occurrence of an entity parameter current. Explain this code long uentseto (UHACT hEnt, long seqNr ); Copy Parameters hEnt Handle to the entity parameter. seqNr Sequence number of the occurrence to be made current. Return Values Table 1. Values returned by uentseto Value Meaning 0 Success. The occurrence was made current. -66 Occurrence handle specified instead of entity handle -150 Hitlist not found -165 The supplied handle is not valid. -1203 The occurrence number is out of range. Use Library: ucall Description uentseto makes the specified occurrence of the specified entity parameter current. This function is very similar to the ProcScript function setocc . In particular, it follows the same rules for the sequence number seqNr . You cannot use uentseto with an occurrence parameter. Example: uentcreo, uentremo, uentseto The following example uses uentcreo to create 20 occurrences of an entity parameter, and then calls uentremo to remove every other occurrence, so that only the even-numbered occurrences remain. It then activates the operation SETENT in service ENTSRV, that prints the even-numbered occurrences to the message frame. The entity ENT is defined with the following: PK CHAR(3) REC CHAR(20) Copy Operation SETENT is defined as follows: Explain this code operation setent params entity ent : in; endparams $1 = 1 setocc "ent", $1 while ( $status >= 0 ) putmess "pk = %%pk rec = %%rec" $1 = $1 + 1 setocc "ent", $1 endwhile return 0 end Copy The following is the 3GL code: Explain this code #include <h3gl.h> void set_ent () { UHACT hEnv, hIn; /* Environment and instance handle */ UHACT hOp, hEnt; /* Operation and entity handles */ long actStatus, procErr; /* Activation status and procerr */ int i; /* Occurrence loop counter */ char s1[80]; /* Work string */ ueopen(&hEnv;) /* Get environment handle */ uinstnew (hEnv, (UCHAR *)"ENTSRV", 0, 0, UDEFAULT_COMM_MODE, 0, &hIn, &procErr);/*Instantiate service ENTSRV */ uinstopr (hIn, (UCHAR *)"SETENT", 0, &hOp);/*Instantiate operation SETENT */ uprmgeth(hOp, 1, 0, &hEnt); /* Get entity handle for ENT parameter */ for ( i=1 ; i<=20; i++ ) /* Do 20 occurrences */ { uentcreo(hEnt, -1); /* Add occurrence at the end */ sprintf(s1, "%d", i); /* Generate PK data */ ustr2uf(hEnt, 1, s1); /* Fill PK */ sprintf(s1, "Record %d", i);/* Generate REC data */ ustr2uf(hEnt, 2, s1); /* Fill REC */ } for ( i=1; /* Delete every other occurrence */ uentremo(hEnt, i)==UACT_SUCCESS; i++ ); uopract (hOp, &actStatus, &procErr); /* Activate ENTSRV */ uinstdel (hIn, 0); /* Delete ENTSRV instance */ ufreeh (&hOp;) /* Free SETENT operation handle */ ufreeh (&hIn;) /* Free ENTSRV instance handle */ ufreeh (&hEnv;) /* Free environment handle */ } Copy Related Links uentcreo Create an occurrence of an entity parameter, and make it current. uentgeto Return the current occurrence number within an entity parameter.
